title: Payment service null reference on order processing
resolution_summary: Null check added before accessing order.id in PaymentService. Root cause: race condition when order was deleted mid-processing.

title: Database connection pool exhausted under load
resolution_summary: Increased connection pool size from 10 to 50. Added connection timeout and retry logic. Root cause: traffic spike during promotion.

title: Auth service JWT validation failures
resolution_summary: JWT secret rotation caused token mismatch. Rolled back secret and coordinated rotation with zero-downtime procedure.

title: High CPU on application servers causing latency
resolution_summary: Inefficient regex in request parser causing CPU spike. Optimized regex and added rate limiting.

title: Network packet loss between services
resolution_summary: Misconfigured firewall rule blocking inter-service traffic. Reverted last network config change.

title: Application OOM crash in worker process
resolution_summary: Memory leak in event listener not being cleaned up. Added proper cleanup in service shutdown hooks.

title: Payment gateway webhook HMAC signature mismatch
resolution_summary: Webhook secret was rotated on provider side without notice. Updated secret in environment variables.

title: Postgres deadlock on concurrent order updates
resolution_summary: Deadlock caused by inconsistent lock ordering in transaction. Fixed by standardizing table access order.

title: Redis cache eviction causing payment double-processing
resolution_summary: Redis maxmemory policy set to allkeys-lru evicted idempotency keys. Changed policy and increased memory.
